chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1659 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 6510/25 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 6511/25 4.For hearing of main case 30-09-2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Counsel for the petitioner submits that for redressal of his grievance, the petitioner has already moved an application dated 18.08.2025 through TCS (available at page-121 of the Court file) to the Secretary, School Education & Literacy Department, Government of Sindh (respondent No.2), which has not yet been decided. He, therefore, prays for a direction to respondent No.2 to decide the same within the shortest possible time. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose the request, recording his no objection. Accordingly, the instant petition along with listed application(s) is disposed of with a direction to the respondent No.2 to decide the petitioner’s aforesaid application, if still pending, strictly in accordance with law within a period of thirty days. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
